focus: Ethiopia tax-benefit surface: employment and business income tax (with the minimum alternative tax), presumptive turnover tax, pension contributions, VAT, the urban and rural PSNP arms, school feeding and uniforms, and fuel subsidies.
purpose: Household-level comparison-oracle and supporting-source references for Ethiopia Axiom coverage. None of these are legal authority.
oracle_scope: A RuleSpec oracle must be an executable, pinned external calculator that accepts household-level inputs and returns household-level tax-benefit outputs comparable to Axiom outputs. Aggregate simulators, distributional reports, parameter documentation, and public model summaries are supporting references only, not oracles.

oracles.name: ETMOD
oracles.dataset: et_2014_a4, et_2016_a5, et_2019_a2, et_2022_a2 (survey-based input microdata shipped in the bundle)
oracles.role: Household-level tax-benefit comparison oracle for Ethiopia. ETMOD is the SOUTHMOD tax-benefit microsimulation model for Ethiopia (UNU-WIDER). Built on the EUROMOD platform; systems ET_2014-ET_2025.

availability_check.detail: The licensed SOUTHMOD A4.0 bundle held under the Adhesion Agreement for the Ghana lane also carries ETMOD with systems ET_2014-ET_2025 and four bundled survey-based input datasets, so per-case and dataset-backed probes need no further data application (personal links; non-redistributable; the bundle and datasets must never be committed or shared). The EUROMOD-engine runtime is proven from the Ghana lane (x86_64 py3.12 venv + euromod 0.2.18 + x64 .NET 10). Per-case parity suites run against ET_2025 (= EFY2025/26, carrying the Proclamation 1395/2025 schedules); the ET_2025/et_2022_a2 employment uprating factor is 1.7035555555555557 (probed). The ET_2025 policy-surface inventory is recorded at ~/.axiom/oracles/southmod/harness-et/etmod/inventory_result.json.
